name: Time Picker
description: A highly customized and smooth Time Picker component with a scroll-driven animated analog clock face.
longDescription: A completely custom-built time picker that features both Single Time and Time Range selection modes. It includes a scroll-driven animated analog clock face whose hands perfectly sync with the scroll position of the digital time lists using React Native Reanimated spring physics.
features: Custom built, scroll-driven interactive analog clock
Supports both Single Time and Time Range selection modes
Fluid spring animations using React Native Reanimated
Fully customizable colors and theme support

props.name: theme
props.description: The color theme for the time picker.

props.name: initialIndex
props.description: The starting index for the time list (0-47).

props.name: onTimeChange
props.description: Callback fired when a single time is selected.

props.name: onRangeChange
props.description: Callback fired when a time range is selected.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Optional custom styles for the main container.

usage.title: Basic Usage
usage.description: Render the time picker in your view. It automatically handles its own expanded/collapsed states.

steps: Copy TimePicker.tsx to your components folder
